target.proof_subject: helper-local combinational equivalence under the checked RTL model

candidate.description: replace bit-priority wrapped-IID comparison with direct same-wrap/other-wrap relational compare

area.interpretation: helper-level and two-parent-screen area-positive; full same-candidate timing/power remains pending

helper_equivalence.command: read_verilog -sv ct_rtu_compare_iid_gold.v; rename ct_rtu_compare_iid ct_rtu_compare_iid_gold; read_verilog -sv ct_rtu_compare_iid_gate_candidate.v; proc; opt; equiv_make ct_rtu_compare_iid_gold ct_rtu_compare_iid equiv; hierarchy -top equiv; flatten; opt; equiv_simple; equiv_status -assert

proof_negative_control.mutation: weaken same-wrap strict comparison from > to >=
proof_negative_control.command: same as helper_equivalence, with ct_rtu_compare_iid_gate_proof_mutant.v as gate

proof_mutant.interpretation: functional proof red control; the helper equivalence check rejects the equality-boundary mutation

known_boundaries: helper/parent area scout only; not promoted as a result row
timing and power are not claimed by this package
parent screens are synthesis-area screens, not full LSU or whole-core closure
not whole LSU, whole C910/BOOM, ISA, memory consistency, speculation recovery, composed optimization, or whole-chip authority

next_independent_check.ask: Run full same-candidate replay with timing and power plus a metric red-control before any promotion discussion.
